import asyncio


async def fetch_user(user_id):
    response = await http_client.get(f"/users/{user_id}")
    return response.json()


async def process_batch(items):
    tasks = [fetch_user(item["user_id"]) for item in items]
    results = await asyncio.gather(*tasks)
    return results


async def send_notifications(users):
    tasks = [notify_user(user["email"], user["name"]) for user in users]
    await asyncio.gather(*tasks)


async def sync_data(source, dest):
    data = await source.read_all()
    await dest.write_all(data)
    await refresh_cache()
